page_content:
Formerly: BSCV181.

CPCV101 College Park Scholars: Civic Engagement for Social Good First- Year Colloquium II (1 Credit)

Examination of domestic societal issues and their national, regional,

and local dimensions from political, economic, and policy perspectives. Students will work with local direct service non-profit organizations. Prerequisite: CPCV100.

Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars Civic Engagement for Social Good (CPCV) program.

Credit Only Granted for. BSCV182 or CPCV101.
